outreach.trend_title: National Logistics Policy Targets 8% Cost Reduction by 2027
outreach.subject: National Logistics Policy Targets 8% Cost Reduction by 2027: strategic implications for Delhivery
outreach.body:
Hi Sakshi,

I noticed Delhivery operates right in the path of a significant shift we have been tracking — national logistics policy targets 8% cost reduction by 2027.

Our market intelligence team has been mapping how this is playing out across the logistics supply chain sector, and there are some patterns emerging that are directly relevant to your 12000-person operation in Gurugram. Specifically, we see companies of your profile facing talent acquisition challenges as a result of these shifts.

We have prepared a concise benchmarking analysis covering how peer companies are responding. Would it be helpful to share this over a 15-minute call this week?

Best regards,
CMI Research Team
